nasb.text: The archers shot King Josiah, and the king said to his servants, “Take me away, for I am badly wounded.”

esv.text: And the archers shot King Josiah. And the king said to his servants, “Take me away, for I am badly wounded.”

cnv.text: 弓箭手射中了約西亞王；王對他的臣僕說：“你們把我帶走吧，因為我受了重傷。”

ccb.text: 约西亚王在战场上中箭受伤，就对仆人说：“我受了重伤，带我离开吧。”
